name: Error Handling
description: Recovery strategies, fallback chains, and graceful degradation patterns.

strategies.name: 3_tier_fallback
strategies.session_flag: use_fallback_generator bypasses Tier 1 for all remaining chunks after first failure

strategies.name: non_blocking_visual_review
strategies.behavior: Any failure (LibreOffice not found, API error, timeout) returns success=True with warning
strategies.result: Output file left unchanged; pipeline completes normally

strategies.name: graceful_image_skip
strategies.behavior: Missing GOOGLE_API_KEY, unparseable plans, or individual image generation failures do not stop the workflow

strategies.name: interim_file_preservation
strategies.behavior: No os.remove() or shutil.rmtree() on chunk files
strategies.purpose: Debugging failed chunks; files persist across runs
